info.title: Lyrics API
info.description:
These endpoints return metadata about songs and lyrics.  
For full details, see the [API reference](https://docs.musixmatch.com/lyrics-api/introduction) for these endpoints.

To authenticate your API requests and use the endpoints, you need to include your API key as a **query parameter** (`apikey`) in every call, like this:

`GET /ws/1.1/track.get?apikey=YOUR_API_KEY`.

In Postman, enter your API Key in the **Auth** tab, where it will be automatically appended to the request. **Best Practice:** Use **Postman Vault** to securely store your key; see the official [Postman documentation](https://learning.postman.com/docs/sending-requests/postman-vault/postman-vault-secrets/) for details.

Always keep your API key secure and never share it publicly. If you believe your API key has been compromised, contact us immediately at `sales@musixmatch.com`.

get.description: Match your song against our database.

parameters.name: q_track
parameters.description: The song title. Required if the track_isrc is not indicated.

parameters.name: q_artist
parameters.description: The song artist. Required if the track_isrc is not indicated.

parameters.name: track_isrc
parameters.description: (Optional parameter) A valid ISRC identifier. If you have an ISRC ID in your catalogue you can query using this ID only.

parameters.name: q_track

get.description: Search for track in our database.

parameters.name: q_track
parameters.description: The song title.

parameters.name: q_artist
parameters.description: The song artist.

parameters.name: q_lyrics
parameters.description: Any word in the lyrics.

parameters.name: q_track_artist
parameters.description: Any word in the song title or artist name.

parameters.name: q_writer
parameters.description: Search among writers.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Any word in the song title or artist name or lyrics.

parameters.name: f_artist_id
parameters.description: When set, filters by this artist ID.

parameters.name: f_music_genre_id
parameters.description: When set, filters by this music category ID.

parameters.name: f_lyrics_language
parameters.description: Filter by the lyrics language (en,it,..).

parameters.name: f_has_lyrics

identifier.description: Your Musical Work’s unique identifier. Submitting updated data with the same 'identifier' creates a new version of the same Work.

alternate_titles.description: A list of known alternate titles

iswc.description: The ISWC of the Work being submitted (example: T3452468001 or T-123456789-1).

isrc.description: A list of ISRCs that are known to be linked to the Work (example: AA6Q72000047 or AA-6Q7-20-00047).

identifier.description: The performers's unique identifier on your side.
The Publisher's unique identifier on your side

ipi.description: The Publisher's IPI. IPI consists of max 11 digits.

role.description: The Publisher's role (either "E", "SE" or "AM" for Original Publisher, Sub-Publisher or Administrator, respectively).

controlled.description: The Publisher's controlled status, either 'Y' or 'N'

mech_ownership_share.description: The share of Mechanical rights owned by this Publisher. Shares are defined as 5 digits (i.e. 00000 no share, 10000 full share, 05000 half share).

perf_ownership_share.description: The share of Performing rights owned by this Publisher. Shares are defined as 5 digits (i.e. 00000 no share, 10000 full share, 05000 half share).

sync_ownership_share.description: The share of Synchronization rights owned by this Publisher. Shares are defined as 5 digits (i.e. 00000 no share, 10000 full share, 05000 half share).

identifier.description: The Writer's unique identifier on your side.

ipi.description: The Writer's IPI. IPI consists of max 11 digits.

role.description: The Writer's role (e.g. 'CA' for Composer-Author, 'C' for Composer, 'A' for Author, etc.)

controlled.description: The Writer's controlled status, either 'Y' or 'N'

mech_ownership_share.description: The share of Mechanical rights owned by this Writer. Shares are defined as 5 digits (i.e. 00000 no share, 10000 full share, 05000 half share).

perf_ownership_share.description: The share of Performing rights owned by this Writer. Shares are defined as 5 digits (i.e. 00000 no share, 10000 full share, 05000 half share).

sync_ownership_share.description: The share of Synchronization rights owned by this Writer. Shares are defined as 5 digits (i.e. 00000 no share, 10000 full share, 05000 half share).

owners.description: The right holders, split into Songwriters and Publishers.

collection.description: Details on collected royalties, on a per-territory basis

validity_begin.description: Beginning of deal, in the YYYY-MM-DD format. If omitted, the date of submission will be used instead.

validity_end.description: End of deal, in the YYYY-MM-DD format.

territories.description: A list of territories where royalties are collected.

code.description: One of the territory codes where you collect. For Worldwide use "XW", otherwise use 2-digit ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2), a two-letter country codes standard published by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO).

mech_share.description: The share of Mechanical royalties collected in this territory. For example, 100% becomes 10000, 50% becomes 5000, 12.50% becomes 1250, 33.3333% becomes 3333 and so on. At least one of the shares properties (sync_share or perf_share or mech_share) is required.

perf_share.description: The share of Performing royalties collected in this territory. For example, 100% becomes 10000, 50% becomes 5000, 12.50% becomes 1250, 33.3333% becomes 3333 and so on.

sync_share.description: The share of Synchronization royalties collected in this territory. For example, 100% becomes 10000, 50% becomes 5000, 12.50% becomes 1250, 33.3333% becomes 3333 and so on.

lyrics.description: [Optional] Provide the lyrics for this Work along with its ownership details.

duration.description: The duration in seconds of the original recording.

lyrics.description: The lyrics for this Work, verses separated by line feed. Remember to encode strings properly as the JSON format is used.

lrc.description: Lyrics in LRC format (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/LRC_(file_format)). Make sure the last row has the time indication and an empty lyrics line. This time will correspond to the timing of the end of the last lyrics line, example: '[04:10.010] \n'

schema.description: The data schema for submitting data of a musical work.

hint.example: JSON in input doesn't respect the API JSON schema - errorType: required - errorDetails: {"missing":"title"} - errorPath: ["data"]

header.hint: JSON in input doesn't respect the API JSON schema - errorType: required - errorDetails: {"missing":"title"} - errorPath: ["data"]

post.description: Submit validity dates for a musical work.

identifier.description: Your Musical Work’s unique identifier used in the work ingestion phase

validity_end.description: End date of the deal. Format: YYYY-MM-DD (date).

lyrics.example:
('Til I'm in the grave)

I want you to stay
'Til I'm in the grave
'Til I rot away, dead and buried
'Til I'm in the casket you carry

If you go, I'm going too, uh
'Cause it was always you, alright
And if I'm turnin' blue, please don't save me
Nothing left to lose without my baby

Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone
Can't change the weather, might not be forever
But if it's forever, it's even better

And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
It might not be long, but baby, I
I'll love you 'til the day that I die
'Til the day that I die
'Til the light leaves my eyes
'Til the day that I die

I want you to see, hm
How you look to me, hm
You wouldn't believe if I told ya
You would keep the compliments I throw ya

But you're so full of shit, uh
Tell me it's a bit, no
Say you don't see it, your mind's polluted
Say you wanna quit, don't be stupid

And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
Might not be long, but baby, I
Don't wanna say goodbye

Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know ('til the day that I die)
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone ('til the light leaves my eyes)
Can't change the weather, might not be forever ('til the day I die)
But if it's forever, it's even better

I knew you in another life
You had that same look in your eyes
I love you, don't act so surprised

[02:40.42] Can't change the weather, might not be forever ('til the day I die)
[02:44.33] But if it's forever, it's even better
[02:49.98] I knew you in another life
[02:54.55] You had that same look in your eyes
[02:59.44] I love you, don't act so surprised
